mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 230 in the CPIAUCSL series triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflation above 230, or CPIAUCSL fails to predict returns in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in PAYEMS and decline in UNRATE signal a tightening labor market, increasing corporate profit margins and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction between PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to explain SPX returns (p > 0.10) in 3-year rolling regressions, or returns are negative in 60%+ of co-movement instances.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in RSAFS combined with rising HOUST indicates declining consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS-HOUST interaction fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) in 5-year rolling windows, or returns are positive in 60%+ of co-contraction instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO signals weakening industrial production, reducing corporate earnings expectations and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO fails to predict SPX returns (p > 0.10) in 2-year rolling regressions, or returns are positive in 60%+ of declining INDPRO instances.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in GDPC1 following a 6-month decline indicates recovering economic demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 rebound fails to predict SPX returns (p > 0.05) in 3-year rolling windows, or returns are negative in 60%+ of recovery instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in UNRATE below 7.5% signals labor market overheating, prompting inflationary pressures and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE below 7.5 fails to predict SPX returns (p > 0.10) in 5-year rolling regressions, or returns are positive in 60%+ of low UNRATE instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and rises in CPIAUCSL indicate accommodative monetary policy amid inflation, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS-CPIAUCSL interaction fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) in 3-year rolling windows, or returns are positive in 60%+ of co-movement instances.
